name: 刷闪
刷閃
Bench Macro [Shiny Hunt]
desc:
背对长椅使用
推荐按键L+R+A
持续按住快捷键0.5秒开启循环

背對長椅使用
推薦按鍵 L+R+A
持續按住快捷鍵 0.5 秒開啟循環
Position yourself with your back to the bench you've chosen to sit on, as if you were just killing time. Press L+R+A to activate the macro, holding these buttons for one second to start the loop.
macros.author: FuuDigo

name: 返回入口的超空间
返回入口的超空间
Hyperspace back to entrance
desc: 打开地图 > 返回超空间旷野地带入口。用途：反复刷新入口附近的怪物。
打开地图 > 返回超空间旷野地带入口。用途：反复刷新入口附近的怪物。
Opens map > back to hyperspace wild zone entrance. Usage: Respawning mons close to entrance over and over.
macros.author: Eulloyd

name: 餐厅刷等级
餐廳刷等級
Dining room brush level
desc: 在谱通餐馆NPC面前长按ZL+↓即可开始自动刷等级
在譜通餐館NPC面前長按ZL+↓即可開始自動刷等級
Press ZL + ↓ for a long time in front of NPCs in the spectrum restaurant to start automatic level brushing.
macros.author: 绘梨

name: 刷闪光（头目）呱呱泡蛙
刷閃光（頭目）呱呱泡蛙
Brush Flash (Head) Quack Bubble Frog
desc: 需手动传送一次第五区，传送完成后不要移动，长按ZL+L宏循环自动传送第五区刷闪
需手動傳送一次第五區，傳送完成后不要移動，長按ZL+L宏循環自動傳送第五區刷閃
Need to manually transfer the fifth area once, do not move after the transfer is completed, long press ZL + L macro cycle to automatically transfer the fifth area flash
macros.author: 绘梨
